title: penstemon palmeri
intro: Penstemon palmeri, also known as Palmer's penstemon or Palmer's beardtongue, is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and providing relief from coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of Penstemon palmeri can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, or by using the dried plant material in a poultice to apply topically to affected areas.
